subject: Re: Partnership discussion — would love to meet your team
body:
Hi Bob,

Thanks for following up after the conference — it was great to connect there. I'd be glad to get a meeting on the calendar to discuss how we might work together.

Let me check availability for next week and propose a few time slots for a 30-minute call.

Regarding direct contact details for senior technical leadership, I'm not able to share those externally. I'm happy to facilitate any necessary introductions internally after our initial meeting if it makes sense to involve them.

I'll be in touch soon with scheduling options.

Best regards
